description:
Salad turns downtime into downloads. Run Salad whenever you're away from the keys to score games, gift cards, subscriptions, DLC, and more at the Salad Storefront.


Update to version 1.9.21:
- Fixes an issue where machine capabilities, including available memory, could fail to be accurately reported, preventing container workload assignment. 🐛
- Fixes an issue where a container workload could appear keep running after it should have stopped. 🐛
- Fixes an issue where a user appears to be be logged out after the app restarted. 🐛
- Fixes potential restarts and crashes when workloads were starting or stopping. 🐛
- General maintenance and reliability improvements. 👷
